name: Speedy Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can French cut green beans (drain)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together stewed tomatoes, cream of celery soup, drained green beans, cooked chicken, and Italian seasoning.
3. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 13x9x2 inch baking dish.
4. In another bowl, combine Bisquick Original mix and milk until smooth.
5. Spread the baking mixture evenly over the chicken mixture in the baking dish.
6. Sprinkle shredded Cheddar cheese and 1/2 teaspoon Italian seasoning over the top.
7. Bake for 25 to 27 minutes or until the crust is light golden brown and the cheese is melted.
